data.body:
For this discussion about Canada, Westminster parliaments began in the 1300s.

Parties came later.

Athens is regarded by scholars as the birthplace of modern democracy.

We use their word dêmos '(common) people' and krátos 'force/might' to describe it.

The Athenians didn’t go for parties either.
